Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

REAL PARTY IN INTEREST GARDEN CITY, INC.'s Joinder In Sutters Place, Inc., Dba Bay 101's Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is taken under submission.
